## LibraryData.ILibraryLoadParams.excluded property

Patterns to exclude. Collection names matching any pattern are excluded (takes precedence over included). Strings are matched exactly, RegExp patterns use `.test()`<!-- -->.

**Signature:**

```typescript
readonly excluded?: ReadonlyArray<FilterPattern>;
```
